channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Negotiate pay in weak currencies
item.description: Close remote offers 86 % faster and cut FX loss 95 % using Stack Overflow 2026 salary bands and Wise Business hedging — exact scripts and templates included

item.title: No CS degree? Bypass the gatekeeping
item.description: Cut time to senior engineer 50% without a CS degree — the only metrics that matter, tools to master, and the systems that got people promoted in 2026.

item.title: Non-traditional stacks shipping today
item.description: Cut API latency 50% with Bun + Elysia in 2026 — the non-traditional stacks real developers shipped with. See cost breakdowns, setup times, and the one mistake I made when I assumed everyone needed Kubernetes.

item.title: Cut Node.js carbon 30% without latency loss
item.description: Cut cloud carbon 30% without slowing APIs — Node.js 20 async refactor, connection pooling, and real benchmark numbers from a 1.2M-user Latin American stack.

item.title: Freelance dev burnout: it wasn’t hours
item.description: Cut freelance developer burnout 40% with stack isolation, notification firewall, and clean-slate environments — real metrics, tools, and exact commands you can use today.

item.title: Self-taught to senior: no degree, no excuses
item.description: Senior in 18 months without a CS degree — real systems, real metrics, and the hiring pipeline that actually rewards impact, not algorithms. Reduce API latency 70%, cut AWS costs 40%, and prove seniority with production ownership.

item.title: Message queues: the hype vs the hard data
item.description: Message queues hype data: owed that 68% had adopted a message queue (. Practical guide with real examples.

item.title: Why seniors flee big tech
item.description: Exit interviews with 22 engineers reveal why senior talent flees big tech in 2026 — decision fatigue, impact erosion, and context switching costs, not salary.

item.title: Sell higher, not cheaper from abroad
item.description: Negotiate remote pay from lower-cost countries using real 2026 data and a pricing calculator that converts your cost into a defensible rate. Learn how to justify $118/hour without apologizing for your location.

item.title: Design multi-tenant SaaS without locking yourself out
item.description: Cut multi-tenant SaaS costs 60% by splitting databases per tenant — when to use tenant_id column vs registry pattern with Postgres 16, Neon, and Fly.io in 2026

item.title: Measure 5G backend costs before you ship
item.description: Cut 5G backend latency 55% with streaming uploads, adaptive timeouts, and netem traces — measure TCP resets, TLS renegotiations, and carrier NAT timeouts before you ship

item.title: AI built my first 5 apps: what actually shipped
item.description: Cut time-to-first-deploy from days to 12 minutes with AI scaffolding — the real tools non-traditional developers used to ship products in 2026

item.title: Salary boosts from AI infra in 2026
item.description: 2026 AI salary data: prompt-tuning vs vector-search infra — the skills that actually move the paycheck with concrete benchmarks and cost numbers.

item.title: Track 7 silent LLM pipeline failures
item.description: Cut LLM pipeline latency 60% with 7 metrics most teams miss — prompt cache hit ratio, token budget, embedding cache, generation latency, hallucination rate, model drift, upstream RTT.

item.title: RAG pipelines: the 40ms lie in tutorials
item.description: Cut RAG latency 96% without adding servers — batch retrieval, query rewriting, and chunk-ID caching in production. 3.2M queries served at p95 42ms on $240/month Kubernetes.

item.title: Killed by good intentions: over-engineering costs
item.description: Cut API latency 76% and cost 80% by replacing microservices with a tamed monolith — the real cost of over-engineering in 2026.

item.title: Pick the right real-time protocol in 2026
item.description: Choose WebSocket, SSE, or long polling in 2026 with real latency, cost, and memory data from Node 20, Python 3.12, and Redis 7.2 benchmarks.

item.title: Set maxPoolSize=10? Wrong default
item.description: Cut API latency 60% by resizing connection pools — Aurora PostgreSQL 3.04.2 case study with concrete numbers for pool size, cost, and latency

item.title: Local LLM: it’s slower than you think
item.description: Cut local LLM latency 60% with the right model and tooling — context limits, 4-bit quantization, and why most benchmarks lie

item.title: Measure vector search before buying a DB
item.description: Cut vector DB costs 60% with pgvector vs Milvus — latency benchmarks, cache hit tactics, and the exact metric to check before you buy.
